name: Ocean Glass Public Company Limited
summary: Ocean Glass Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells table glassware in Thailand and internationally. It offers a range of glasses, such as water, iced beverage, whiskey, beer, wine, coffee and tea, and dining glasses, as well as storage jars and handy packs. The company offers its products under the Ocean and Lucaris brand names. It serves food service, retail, and B2B markets through distributors in approximately 90 countries. Ocean Glass Public Company Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
